Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product details to use as email content source material.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will leverage AI and backend integrations to retrieve order data, product specs, and knowledge base articles to generate accurate, real-time responses.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand's niche.

Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich creator profiles with quantifiable metrics, eliminating hours of manual research per creator and ensuring data-driven discovery.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and consolidates all discovered creator data, filters for relevance, and produces a structured shortlist of potential creator partners.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Transforms raw discovery data into an actionable, prioritized creator list, saving the team from manually reviewing hundreds of profiles.

Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective gut-feel decisions with a consistent, data-driven scoring system that ensures only the highest-potential creators move to outreach.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt instructions from Google Drive to inform the AI's outreach strategy.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators via Gmail and tracks delivery and response status.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data on specific two-piece rotor fitments, asking about interest levels and volume expectations.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Proactively collects real demand signals from customers before committing to inventory, reducing the risk of stocking parts with insufficient market interest.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, DFC cross-references, and customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Provides Dino with a single, comprehensive output that combines competitor intelligence, internal coverage analysis, and customer demand data for strategic decision-making.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad creatives and copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, extracting every text field including headlines, descriptions, and primary text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility into all live ad copy across platforms without requiring manual review of each campaign, ad set, and individual ad.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches the extracted ad copy for the specified target phrases and flags every match, recording the exact field, ad name, and surrounding copy where each phrase appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance risks, outdated messaging, or unauthorized claims in seconds across hundreds of ads, a task that would take hours to do manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a structured email report listing every flagged ad with the specific phrase matched, the field it appeared in, and the full copy for context.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable flagged-ad report directly to the requester's inbox, enabling immediate corrective action on non-compliant or problematic ad copy.
